perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a grey flat cap (Tim) speaks directly to the camera, pointing forward with an energetic expression. (2) The scene cuts to a large, white, pod-like machine called the 'Science Mirai Human Washing Machine' in a showroom. (3) Close-up shots follow showing water mist and bubbles forming inside a nozzle. (4) A woman is shown lying inside the transparent-sided pod, appearing relaxed as if in a spa. (5) Tim returns to the screen holding a transparent display that shows a heart rate graph and physiological data. (6) A scenic shot of a sunset over the ocean is shown. (7) Tim finishes by gesturing with his hands while speaking enthusiastically.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched and excited male vocals start immediately over a fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop background music. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the male voice describes the features of the machine. (3) Subtle splashing and misting sound effects are heard during the close-ups of the machine's interior. (4) The audio remains continuous and high-energy until the end, with the music fading out on the final sentence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你最久幾天不洗澡?' (Traditional Chinese: Provocative hook/question). (2) '冬天的時後，是不是覺得洗澡又冷又麻煩' (Traditional Chinese: Functional text describing a problem). (3) '懶人洗澡機來了' (Traditional Chinese: Descriptive title). (4) '15分鐘全自動喔' (Traditional Chinese: Functional feature description). (5) '採用了奈米氣泡深入毛孔洗淨' (Traditional Chinese: Technical feature description). (6) '甚至就像SPA一樣享受' (Traditional Chinese: Emotional benefit). (7) '舒緩你的心靈' (Traditional Chinese: Emotional benefit). (8) '我都心動了' (Traditional Chinese: Emotional hook).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Feature Demonstration -> Emotional Appeal -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female model in the machine, and approximately 3 blurred passers-by in the expo background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey flat cap, and a royal blue t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A blurred tech exhibition hall with posters, brand logos (Science, Miko), and various displays.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting mixed with exhibition hall ambient light.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to introduce and promote the 'Mirai Human Washing Machine' by Science. It uses a relatable hook (not wanting to shower in winter) to present a high-tech solution, emphasizing both the functional deep-cleaning capabilities and the emotional relaxation/wellness benefits of the device.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features brand logos prominently and provides a detailed walkthrough of the product's features and benefits.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host's signature flat cap and high-energy delivery style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video is tailored for social media consumption with a square aspect ratio and heavy use of dynamic text overlays to maintain viewer engagement.
